title: YTP of fail - Or Else You Will Eat Pie!
description:
Had this one buried in the projects pile for a reason, but it couldn't contain itself any longer and decided to show the world it's majestic failure of being what could have been my first poop :P

This was when 'What is Spagetti' and  'Luigi's Subliminal Message' were the first poops I saw and were inspiration for me to try out this wierd and wonderful craft. That sort of turned on it's head when I found that I can make Baron Silas Greenback say 'Cock', so this gathered dust for 20 odd vids until now.

Sit back and cringe... :D
